title: Build a Shopping Cart
description: Create a shopping cart with Context-backed global state, useReducer actions, and immutable updates — the pattern every e-commerce checkout flow builds on.
requirements: CartContext with CartProvider wrapping the app
useReducer for cart state with typed actions
CartItem type with product id, title, price, quantity
ADD_ITEM action — add new or increment quantity if exists
REMOVE_ITEM action — remove by product id
UPDATE_QUANTITY action — set quantity, remove if 0
Cart page showing line items with quantity controls
Cart total computed from items (price × quantity sum)
Empty cart UI with link back to products
Cart icon/badge in navbar showing item count
Immutable updates only — no push, splice, or direct mutation
acceptanceCriteria: Adding same product twice increments quantity, not duplicate rows
Remove button deletes item from cart
Total updates correctly when quantities change
Cart state accessible from product page and cart page without prop drilling
npm run build passes with strict TypeScript
hints: Define CartAction as discriminated union: { type: 'ADD_ITEM'; payload: Product } | ...
Reducer must return new state object — never mutate state.items
Export useCart() custom hook that throws if used outside provider
Compute total in selector function or useMemo from cart items
Combine with Day 10 product listing — Add to Cart button on ProductCard

bonus.title: Cart persistence
requirements: Persist cart to localStorage and hydrate on load
Disable Add to Cart when item already at max quantity

debuggingScenarios.title: Mutating state
debuggingScenarios.symptom: UI does not update after cart action; React DevTools shows same reference
debuggingScenarios.fix: Return { ...state, items: [...state.items, newItem] } or map for updates

debuggingScenarios.title: Wrong Context updates
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Cart works in one component but not another; useCart throws
debuggingScenarios.cause: Component outside CartProvider or wrong context default value
debuggingScenarios.fix: Wrap App with CartProvider; useCart reads from created context; no default mutable object

debuggingScenarios.title: Wrong total calculation
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Total does not match sum of line items
debuggingScenarios.cause: Summing prices without multiplying by quantity, or floating point display
debuggingScenarios.fix: items.reduce((sum, i) => sum + i.price * i.quantity, 0); use toFixed(2) for display
